summary.classification_note: A harmonic resonance ladder is present, but it is split across observables: topology shows 2 visible bands, with d0 isolated from the dispersive d1-d4 sector, while resonance alignment further stratifies that sector into d1/d4 (0.173) versus d2/d3 (0.221). Sensitive transitions appear at 0->1.
